feed.title: Maine Revenue Services Tax Return Forms
feed.subtitle: Index links to per-tax-type/year subpages with per-form 'Revised <date>' text; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the index page. NEEDS SELECTOR REVIEW: consider targeting a specific current-year subpage table per tax type instead.

entry.title: Monitoring started: Maine Revenue Services Tax Return Forms
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
